spanish: Podríamos tener alojados en data centers a modelos de inteligencia artificial tan potentes como serían las mentes más brillantes.
english: We could have hosted in data centers AI models as powerful as the brightest minds would be.
explanation: Conditional tense 'podríamos' expressing hypothetical possibility, comparative structure with 'tan...como' (as...as)

spanish: Ha sabido conectar fuentes de conocimiento que no estaban conectadas para darnos una solución.
english: It has been able to connect sources of knowledge that were not connected to give us a solution.
explanation: Present perfect 'ha sabido' + relative clause with 'que' + imperfect subjunctive 'estaban' describing past state

spanish: Si realmente queremos evaluar si es capaz de generar este nuevo conocimiento, necesitamos una estrategia más rigurosa.
english: If we really want to evaluate if it is capable of generating this new knowledge, we need a more rigorous strategy.
explanation: Conditional clause with 'si' + present indicative, followed by 'si' with present indicative in relative clause
